## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences. Focus on what changed and why.

## Related Issues

Closes #

If there is no related issue, write `N/A`.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup
- [ ] Test-only change
- [ ] CI or build change

## Testing

List the checks you ran and their results.

```bash
# Example
python -m pytest -v
```

If you did not run a relevant check, explain why.

## Documentation

- [ ] No documentation changes were needed
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] Sphinx docs updated
- [ ] Docstrings updated

If documentation was updated, summarize it here.

## Screenshots or Example Output

Include screenshots, generated diagrams, or terminal output if they help review the change.

If not applicable, write `N/A`.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I updated documentation where appropriate
- [ ] I verified existing tests still pass, or explained why I could not
- [ ] I checked for any breaking changes

## Notes for PR Reviewers

Call out anything that needs extra attention during review.
